**Commit**: `c6432ef5314b` — feat(ml): wire Phase 2 kernel exports (MLEngine, detect_backend, TrainingResult, Trainable, train, track)

**Body**:

Additive expose at kailash_ml top level. Convenience km.train() and km.track()
are typed-deferral scaffolds pointing at Phase 3 and Phase 6 respectively
(visibly unfinished per the scaffold-with-phase-pointer pattern, not Rule 2 stubs).

Smoke-verified with main's .venv: detect_backend() picks MPS with 16-mixed
precision on Apple Silicon, MLEngine() zero-arg construction works,
TrainingResult dataclass round-trips.
